title: [Bug]: value changes after UNION ALL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (c1 Float32, c2 Int32 NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT 1 FROM t WHERE tan(0.2) != 0 UNION ALL SELECT (c1 | 0) FROM t;
SELECT (c1 | 0) FROM t WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: UNION ALL with BINARY operator on float values
